Subject: Request to Extend Contract-Review Deadline

Dear [Counsel's Name],

I hope this message finds you well. I'm writing to request a brief extension of our contract-review deadline by one week, in order to ensure our team has sufficient time to complete a thorough review. We remain fully committed to moving the matter forward and believe this short extension will help us provide a more considered response.

Please let me know at your earliest convenience whether this adjustment works for you and your client. I'm happy to discuss by phone or email, and I appreciate your understanding and flexibility.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
